grammar_points.name: "如何" (How)
grammar_points.explanation: 代词'如何'用来询问方式，也常用于句末，用来征求意见或询问状况。多用于书面语。

examples.chinese: 我们明天举行会议，讨论这个问题该如何解决。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen míngtiān jǔxíng huìyì, tǎolùn zhège wèntí gāi rúhé jiějué.
examples.english: We'll hold a meeting tomorrow to discuss how to solve this problem.

examples.chinese: 我们希望由你来负责解决这个问题，如何？
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen xīwàng yóu nǐ lái fùzé jiějué zhège wèntí, rúhé?
examples.english: We hope you'll take charge of solving this problem, how about it?

examples.chinese: 最近工作情况如何？
examples.pinyin: Zuìjìn gōngzuò qíngkuàng rúhé?
examples.english: How is the work situation recently?

grammar_points.name: "靠" (To Lean/Rely On)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词'靠'常见格式为'靠着/在...'，表示身体的部分重量让别人或物体支撑。引申为依靠、依赖。

examples.chinese: 他靠着桌子讲课。
examples.pinyin: Tā kàozhe zhuōzi jiǎngkè.
examples.english: He leans on the table while teaching.

examples.chinese: 在家靠父母，出门靠朋友。
examples.pinyin: Zài jiā kào fùmǔ, chūmén kào péngyou.
examples.english: At home rely on parents, away rely on friends.

examples.chinese: 我想买一个靠海的房子。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yí ge kào hǎi de fángzi.
examples.english: I want to buy a house near the sea.

grammar_points.name: "居然" (Unexpectedly)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'居然'表示没想到、出乎意料，强调结果与预期相反。

examples.chinese: 这么简单的题，你居然也不会做？
examples.pinyin: Zhème jiǎndān de tí, nǐ jūrán yě bú huì zuò?
examples.english: Such a simple question, and you surprisingly can't do it?

examples.chinese: 没想到居然在这儿碰到你！
examples.pinyin: Méi xiǎngdào jūrán zài zhèr pèngdào nǐ!
examples.english: Didn't expect to run into you here!

examples.chinese: 她居然放弃了这次机会。
examples.pinyin: Tā jūrán fàngqì le zhè cì jīhuì.
examples.english: She unexpectedly gave up this opportunity.

grammar_points.name: "以来" (Since)
grammar_points.explanation: '以来'表示从过去某时到现在，常与'自、从'等连用。

examples.chinese: 改革开放以来，中国发生了很大变化。
examples.pinyin: Gǎigé kāifàng yǐlái, Zhōngguó fāshēng le hěn dà biànhuà.
examples.english: Since the reform and opening up, China has undergone great changes.

examples.chinese: 入学以来，他一直很努力。
examples.pinyin: Rùxué yǐlái, tā yìzhí hěn nǔlì.
examples.english: Since enrolling, he has always been very hardworking.

examples.chinese: 长期以来，这个问题一直没解决。
examples.pinyin: Chángqí yǐlái, zhège wèntí yìzhí méi jiějué.
examples.english: For a long time, this problem has remained unsolved.

grammar_points.name: "临" (Just Before)
grammar_points.explanation: '临'表示动作即将发生之前，常用于'临走、临别、临时'等。

examples.chinese: 临走时，妈妈给了我一串钥匙。
examples.pinyin: Lín zǒu shí, māma gěi le wǒ yí chuàn yàoshi.
examples.english: Before leaving, Mom gave me a bunch of keys.

examples.chinese: 临别时，他们互相拥抱。
examples.pinyin: Línbié shí, tāmen hùxiāng yōngbào.
examples.english: At parting, they hugged each other.

examples.chinese: 临时有事情，所以我迟到了。
examples.pinyin: Línshí yǒu shìqing, suǒyǐ wǒ chídào le.
examples.english: Something came up temporarily, so I was late.

title: 人生有选择，一切可改变

grammar_points.name: "从而" (Thus/Thereby)
grammar_points.explanation: 连词'从而'表示结果或进一步的行动，连接两个分句。

examples.chinese: 他努力学习，从而取得了好成绩。
examples.pinyin: Tā nǔlì xuéxí, cóng'ér qǔdé le hǎo chéngjì.
examples.english: He studied hard, thereby achieving good grades.

examples.chinese: 改革开放促进了经济发展，从而提高了人民生活水平。
examples.pinyin: Gǎigé kāifàng cùjìn le jīngjì fāzhǎn, cóng'ér tígāo le rénmín shēnghuó shuǐpíng.
examples.english: Reform and opening up promoted economic development, thereby improving people's living standards.

examples.chinese: 他坚持锻炼身体，从而增强了体质。
examples.pinyin: Tā jiānchí duànliàn shēntǐ, cóng'ér zēngqiáng le tǐzhì.
examples.english: He persisted in exercising, thereby strengthening his constitution.

grammar_points.name: "毕竟" (After All)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'毕竟'表示终究、到底，强调根本事实。

examples.chinese: 毕竟他还小，不懂事。
examples.pinyin: Bìjìng tā hái xiǎo, bù dǒngshì.
examples.english: After all, he's still young and doesn't understand things.

examples.chinese: 这毕竟是他的第一次尝试。
examples.pinyin: Zhè bìjìng shì tā de dì-yí cì chángshì.
examples.english: After all, this is his first attempt.

examples.chinese: 我们毕竟是朋友，应该互相帮助。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen bìjìng shì péngyou, yīnggāi hùxiāng bāngzhù.
examples.english: We are friends after all, we should help each other.

grammar_points.name: "作为" (As)
grammar_points.explanation: '作为'表示某种身份或角色，引出某种判断。

examples.chinese: 作为儿子，应该孝顺父母。
examples.pinyin: Zuòwéi érzi, yīnggāi xiàoshùn fùmǔ.
examples.english: As a son, one should be filial to parents.

examples.chinese: 作为老师，他有责任教育好学生。
examples.pinyin: Zuòwéi lǎoshī, tā yǒu zérèn jiàoyù hǎo xuésheng.
examples.english: As a teacher, he has the responsibility to educate students well.

examples.chinese: 作为中国人，我为祖国感到骄傲。
examples.pinyin: Zuòwéi Zhōngguórén, wǒ wèi zǔguó gǎndào jiāo'ào.
examples.english: As a Chinese person, I feel proud of my motherland.

grammar_points.name: "曾经" (Once/Formerly)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'曾经'表示过去有过某种经历或情况。

examples.chinese: 我曾经去过北京。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ céngjīng qù guo Běijīng.
examples.english: I have been to Beijing before.

examples.chinese: 这里曾经是一个小村庄。
examples.pinyin: Zhèlǐ céngjīng shì yí ge xiǎo cūnzhuāng.
examples.english: This used to be a small village.

examples.chinese: 他曾经是一名军人。
examples.pinyin: Tā céngjīng shì yì míng jūnrén.
examples.english: He was once a soldier.

grammar_points.name: "以...著名" (Famous For)
grammar_points.explanation: 结构'以+名词+著名'表示因某事物而有名。

examples.chinese: 济南以泉水著名。
examples.pinyin: Jǐnán yǐ quánshuǐ zhùmíng.
examples.english: Ji'nan is famous for its springs.

examples.chinese: 中国以长城著名。
examples.pinyin: Zhōngguó yǐ Chángchéng zhùmíng.
examples.english: China is famous for the Great Wall.

examples.chinese: 这家餐厅以川菜著名。
examples.pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng yǐ chuāncài zhùmíng.
examples.english: This restaurant is famous for Sichuan cuisine.

grammar_points.name: "值得" (Worth)
grammar_points.explanation: '值得'表示某事物有价值，值得做或值得看。

examples.chinese: 这本书值得一读。
examples.pinyin: Zhè běn shū zhídé yì dú.
examples.english: This book is worth reading.

examples.chinese: 这个地方值得一去。
examples.pinyin: Zhège dìfang zhídé yí qù.
examples.english: This place is worth visiting.

examples.chinese: 他的建议值得我们考虑。
examples.pinyin: Tā de jiànyì zhídé wǒmen kǎolǜ.
examples.english: His suggestion is worth our consideration.

grammar_points.name: "原来" (It Turns Out/Originally)
grammar_points.explanation: '原来'表示发现真实情况，或者表示原来的状态。

examples.chinese: 原来是这样！
examples.pinyin: Yuánlái shì zhèyàng!
examples.english: So that's how it is!

examples.chinese: 原来这里是片树林。
examples.pinyin: Yuánlái zhèlǐ shì piàn shùlín.
examples.english: Originally this was a forest.

examples.chinese: 我原来不知道这件事。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ yuánlái bù zhīdào zhè jiàn shì.
examples.english: I didn't know about this originally.

grammar_points.name: "据说" (It Is Said)
grammar_points.explanation: '据说'表示根据传说或报道，引出某种说法。

examples.chinese: 据说是他发明的。
examples.pinyin: Jùshuō shì tā fāmíng de.
examples.english: It is said that he invented it.

examples.chinese: 据说明天要下雨。
examples.pinyin: Jùshuō míngtiān yào xiàyǔ.
examples.english: It is said that it will rain tomorrow.

examples.chinese: 据说这个传统已有几千年历史。
examples.pinyin: Jùshuō zhège chuántǒng yǐ yǒu jǐ qiān nián lìshǐ.
examples.english: It is said that this tradition has thousands of years of history.

grammar_points.name: "反而" (On the Contrary)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'反而'表示结果与预期相反。

examples.chinese: 他不但没生气，反而笑了。
examples.pinyin: Tā búdàn méi shēngqì, fǎn'ér xiào le.
examples.english: He wasn't angry, on the contrary, he laughed.

examples.chinese: 药吃了没好，反而更严重了。
examples.pinyin: Yào chī le méi hǎo, fǎn'ér gèng yánzhòng le.
examples.english: The medicine didn't help, on the contrary, it got worse.

examples.chinese: 帮忙反而帮了倒忙。
examples.pinyin: Bāngmáng fǎn'ér bāng le dàománg.
examples.english: Trying to help actually made things worse.

grammar_points.name: "彼此" (Each Other)
grammar_points.explanation: 代词'彼此'表示双方或多方之间，相当于'互相'。

examples.chinese: 他们彼此了解。
examples.pinyin: Tāmen bǐcǐ liǎojiě.
examples.english: They understand each other.

examples.chinese: 我们应该彼此尊重。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen yīnggāi bǐcǐ zūnzhòng.
examples.english: We should respect each other.

examples.chinese: 他们彼此之间有很多共同点。
examples.pinyin: Tāmen bǐcǐ zhījiān yǒu hěn duō gòngtóngdiǎn.
examples.english: They have many things in common with each other.

grammar_points.name: "所谓" (So-Called)
grammar_points.explanation: 形容词'所谓'表示所说的，常用于引出某个概念或名称。

examples.chinese: 所谓的'朝三暮四'，原意是欺骗。
examples.pinyin: Suǒwèi de 'zhāo sān mù sì', yuányì shì qīpiàn.
examples.english: The so-called 'zhao san mu si' originally meant deception.

examples.chinese: 这就是所谓的'人情世故'。
examples.pinyin: Zhè jiùshì suǒwèi de 'rénqíng shìgù'.
examples.english: This is the so-called 'worldly wisdom'.

examples.chinese: 所谓的成功，因人而异。
examples.pinyin: Suǒwèi de chénggōng, yīn rén ér yì.
examples.english: So-called success varies from person to person.

grammar_points.name: "则" (Then/Consequently)
grammar_points.explanation: 连词'则'表示结果或对比，常用于书面语。

examples.chinese: 欲速则不达。
examples.pinyin: Yù sù zé bù dá.
examples.english: Haste makes waste.

examples.chinese: 知之为知之，不知为不知，是知也。
examples.pinyin: Zhī zhī wéi zhī zhī, bù zhī wéi bù zhī, shì zhì yě.
examples.english: Know what you know, know what you don't know, this is true knowledge.

examples.chinese: 思考而后行动，则事半功倍。
examples.pinyin: Sīkǎo ér hòu xíngdòng, zé shìbàn gōngbèi.
examples.english: Think before acting, then you'll get twice the result with half the effort.

grammar_points.name: "其实" (Actually)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'其实'表示实际情况，用于引出真实情况。

examples.chinese: 其实他是个很幽默的人。
examples.pinyin: Qíshí tā shì ge hěn yōumò de rén.
examples.english: Actually he is a very humorous person.

examples.chinese: 表面很严肃，其实很温和。
examples.pinyin: Biǎomiàn hěn yánsù, qíshí hěn wēnhé.
examples.english: Serious on the surface, but actually very gentle.

examples.chinese: 这个问题其实很简单。
examples.pinyin: Zhège wèntí qíshí hěn jiǎndān.
examples.english: This problem is actually very simple.

grammar_points.name: "不但...而且..." (Not Only... But Also...)
grammar_points.explanation: 递进复句，表示进一层的意思。

examples.chinese: 鲁迅不但是伟大的作家，而且是个有趣的人。
examples.pinyin: Lǔxùn búdàn shì wěidà de zuòjiā, érqiě shì ge yǒuqù de rén.
examples.english: Lu Xun was not only a great writer, but also an interesting person.

examples.chinese: 他不但会说英语，而且说得很好。
examples.pinyin: Tā búdàn huì shuō Yīngyǔ, érqiě shuō de hěn hǎo.
examples.english: He not only speaks English, but speaks it very well.

examples.chinese: 这里不但风景美，而且空气好。
examples.pinyin: Zhèlǐ búdàn fēngjǐng měi, érqiě kōngqì hǎo.
examples.english: Here not only is the scenery beautiful, but the air is good.

grammar_points.name: "究竟" (Exactly/After All)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'究竟'用于疑问句，表示追究，相当于'到底'。

examples.chinese: 他究竟去哪儿了？
examples.pinyin: Tā jiūjìng qù nǎr le?
examples.english: Where exactly did he go?

examples.chinese: 究竟谁是对的？
examples.pinyin: Jiūjìng shéi shì duì de?
examples.english: Who is right after all?

examples.chinese: 这件事究竟该怎么办？
examples.pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì jiūjìng gāi zěnme bàn?
examples.english: How exactly should this matter be handled?

grammar_points.name: "可见" (It Can Be Seen)
grammar_points.explanation: 连词'可见'表示根据前面的事实可以得出结论。

examples.chinese: 他每天都迟到，可见他不重视这份工作。
examples.pinyin: Tā měitiān dōu chídào, kějiàn tā bú zhòngshì zhè fèn gōngzuò.
examples.english: He's late every day, it can be seen that he doesn't value this job.

examples.chinese: 销量增长了，可见我们的策略是有效的。
examples.pinyin: Xiāoliàng zēngzhǎng le, kějiàn wǒmen de cèlüè shì yǒuxiào de.
examples.english: Sales have increased, it can be seen that our strategy is effective.

examples.chinese: 可见努力就会有回报。
examples.pinyin: Kějiàn nǔlì jiù huì yǒu huíbào.
examples.english: It can be seen that hard work will be rewarded.

grammar_points.name: "长期" (Long-Term)
grammar_points.explanation: 名词'长期'表示较长的时间，常作状语。

examples.chinese: 长期这样会影响健康。
examples.pinyin: Chángqí zhèyàng huì yǐngxiǎng jiànkāng.
examples.english: Doing this long-term will affect health.

examples.chinese: 长期熬夜对身体不好。
examples.pinyin: Chángqí áoyè duì shēntǐ bù hǎo.
examples.english: Staying up late long-term is bad for the body.

examples.chinese: 他长期在外地工作。
examples.pinyin: Tā chángqí zài wàidì gōngzuò.
examples.english: He has been working out of town for a long time.

grammar_points.name: "最好" (Had Better)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'最好'表示建议，相当于'最好是'。

examples.chinese: 你最好早点儿去。
examples.pinyin: Nǐ zuì hǎo zǎo diǎnr qù.
examples.english: You'd better go early.

examples.chinese: 最好养成规律的作息。
examples.pinyin: Zuì hǎo yǎngchéng guīlǜ de zuòxī.
examples.english: It's best to develop a regular sleep schedule.

examples.chinese: 我们最好先讨论一下。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen zuì hǎo xiān tǎolùn yíxià.
examples.english: We'd better discuss it first.

grammar_points.name: "甚至" (Even)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'甚至'表示突出某事例，强调程度之深。

examples.chinese: 他甚至不知道我的名字。
examples.pinyin: Tā shènzhì bù zhīdào wǒ de míngzi.
examples.english: He doesn't even know my name.

examples.chinese: 甚至连小孩都知道这个道理。
examples.pinyin: Shènzhì lián xiǎohái dōu zhīdào zhège dàolǐ.
examples.english: Even children know this principle.

examples.chinese: 她甚至想放弃。
examples.pinyin: Tā shènzhì xiǎng fàngqì.
examples.english: She even wanted to give up.

grammar_points.name: "不得不" (Have To)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'不得不'表示因某种原因而被迫做某事。

examples.chinese: 因为没车了，他不得不走路回家。
examples.pinyin: Yīnwèi méi chē le, tā bùdébù zǒulù huíjiā.
examples.english: Because there were no more buses, he had to walk home.

examples.chinese: 我不得不承认我错了。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ bùdébù chéngrèn wǒ cuò le.
examples.english: I have to admit I was wrong.

examples.chinese: 因为下雨，我们不得不取消了活动。
examples.pinyin: Yīnwèi xiàyǔ, wǒmen bùdébù qǔxiāo le huódòng.
examples.english: Because of the rain, we had to cancel the event.

grammar_points.name: "限制" (To Limit)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词'限制'表示约束、限定范围。

examples.chinese: 不要让恐惧限制你的发展。
examples.pinyin: Búyào ràng kǒngjù xiànzhì nǐ de fāzhǎn.
examples.english: Don't let fear limit your development.

examples.chinese: 时间限制了我们能做的事情。
examples.pinyin: Shíjiān xiànzhì le wǒmen néng zuò de shìqing.
examples.english: Time limits what we can do.

examples.chinese: 这种想法限制了你的思维。
examples.pinyin: Zhè zhǒng xiǎngfǎ xiànzhì le nǐ de sīwéi.
examples.english: This kind of thinking limits your mind.

grammar_points.name: "发挥" (To Bring Into Play)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词'发挥'表示表现出能力、作用等。

examples.chinese: 要发挥自己的优势。
examples.pinyin: Yào fāhuī zìjǐ de yōushì.
examples.english: You should bring your advantages into play.

examples.chinese: 他在工作中发挥了重要作用。
examples.pinyin: Tā zài gōngzuò zhōng fāhuī le zhòngyào zuòyòng.
examples.english: He played an important role in the work.

examples.chinese: 这个方法发挥了很大的作用。
examples.pinyin: Zhège fāngfǎ fāhuī le hěn dà de zuòyòng.
examples.english: This method played a big role.

grammar_points.name: "讲究" (To Pay Attention To)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词'讲究'表示重视、追求。

examples.chinese: 四合院讲究对称。
examples.pinyin: Sìhéyuàn jiǎngjiu duìchèn.
examples.english: Courtyard houses emphasize symmetry.

examples.chinese: 中国人吃饭讲究色香味俱全。
examples.pinyin: Zhōngguórén chīfàn jiǎngjiu sè xiāng wèi jùquán.
examples.english: Chinese people pay attention to color, smell and taste when eating.

examples.chinese: 他生活很讲究。
examples.pinyin: Tā shēnghuó hěn jiǎngjiu.
examples.english: He is very particular about his lifestyle.

grammar_points.name: "往往" (Often/Tend To)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'往往'表示某种情况经常发生，有规律性。

examples.chinese: 老年人往往早起。
examples.pinyin: Lǎoniánrén wǎngwǎng zǎoqǐ.
examples.english: Elderly people tend to get up early.

examples.chinese: 冬天往往比夏天冷。
examples.pinyin: Dōngtiān wǎngwǎng bǐ xiàtiān lěng.
examples.english: Winter tends to be colder than summer.

examples.chinese: 成功的人往往很努力。
examples.pinyin: Chénggōng de rén wǎngwǎng hěn nǔlì.
examples.english: Successful people tend to be hardworking.

grammar_points.name: "只是" (Only/Merely)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'只是'表示仅仅是、不过是。

examples.chinese: 他只是纸上谈兵，没有实战经验。
examples.pinyin: Tā zhǐshì zhǐshàng-tánbīng, méiyǒu shízhàn jīngyàn.
examples.english: He only talks strategy on paper, without real combat experience.

examples.chinese: 我只是随便说说，你别当真。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ zhǐshì suíbiàn shuōshuo, nǐ bié dàngzhēn.
examples.english: I'm just saying casually, don't take it seriously.

examples.chinese: 这只是一个开始。
examples.pinyin: Zhè zhǐshì yí ge kāishǐ.
examples.english: This is just a beginning.

grammar_points.name: "脱离" (To Detach From)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词'脱离'表示离开、断绝某种关系或状态。

examples.chinese: 理论不能脱离实际。
examples.pinyin: Lǐlùn bùnéng tuōlí shíjì.
examples.english: Theory cannot be detached from reality.

examples.chinese: 他脱离了危险。
examples.pinyin: Tā tuōlí le wēixiǎn.
examples.english: He is out of danger.

examples.chinese: 不要脱离群众。
examples.pinyin: Búyào tuōlí qúnzhòng.
examples.english: Don't detach yourself from the masses.

grammar_points.name: "否则" (Otherwise)
grammar_points.explanation: 连词'否则'表示如果不这样，就会产生某种结果。

examples.chinese: 要注意饮食，否则会影响健康。
examples.pinyin: Yào zhùyì yǐnshí, fǒuzé huì yǐngxiǎng jiànkāng.
examples.english: Pay attention to diet, otherwise it will affect health.

examples.chinese: 要早点出发，否则会迟到。
examples.pinyin: Yào zǎodiǎn chūfā, fǒuzé huì chídào.
examples.english: Leave early, otherwise you'll be late.

examples.chinese: 努力学习，否则考试不会及格。
examples.pinyin: Nǔlì xuéxí, fǒuzé kǎoshì bú huì jígé.
examples.english: Study hard, otherwise you won't pass the exam.

grammar_points.name: "适当" (Appropriate/Proper)
grammar_points.explanation: 形容词'适当'表示合适、恰当。

examples.chinese: 要适当运动。
examples.pinyin: Yào shìdàng yùndòng.
examples.english: Exercise appropriately.

examples.chinese: 适当休息很重要。
examples.pinyin: Shìdàng xiūxi hěn zhòngyào.
examples.english: Proper rest is important.

examples.chinese: 用适当的方式表达意见。
examples.pinyin: Yòng shìdàng de fāngshì biǎodá yìjiàn.
examples.english: Express opinions in an appropriate way.

grammar_points.name: "来不及" (Too Late To)
grammar_points.explanation: '来不及'表示时间不够，无法做某事。

examples.chinese: 再不走就来不及了。
examples.pinyin: Zài bù zǒu jiù láibuji le.
examples.english: If we don't leave now, it'll be too late.

examples.chinese: 后悔也来不及了。
examples.pinyin: Hòuhuǐ yě láibuji le.
examples.english: It's too late to regret now.

examples.chinese: 时间来不及，我们打车吧。
examples.pinyin: Shíjiān láibuji, wǒmen dǎ chē ba.
examples.english: We don't have enough time, let's take a taxi.

grammar_points.name: "与其...不如..." (Rather Than... Better To...)
grammar_points.explanation: 选择复句，表示比较后选择后者。

examples.chinese: 与其后悔，不如现在行动。
examples.pinyin: Yǔqí hòuhuǐ, bùrú xiànzài xíngdòng.
examples.english: Rather than regretting, better to act now.

examples.chinese: 与其抱怨，不如改变。
examples.pinyin: Yǔqí bàoyuàn, bùrú gǎibiàn.
examples.english: Rather than complaining, better to change.

examples.chinese: 与其等待，不如主动争取。
examples.pinyin: Yǔqí děngdài, bùrú zhǔdòng zhēngqǔ.
examples.english: Rather than waiting, better to actively pursue.

grammar_points.name: "所谓" (So-Called)
grammar_points.explanation: 形容词'所谓'用于引出某种说法或概念，有时带有不认可的语气。

examples.chinese: 所谓的'美'，每个人都有不同的理解。
examples.pinyin: Suǒwèi de 'měi', měi ge rén dōu yǒu bùtóng de lǐjiě.
examples.english: The so-called 'beauty', everyone has a different understanding.

examples.chinese: 所谓的成功是什么呢？
examples.pinyin: Suǒwèi de chénggōng shì shénme ne?
examples.english: What is so-called success?

examples.chinese: 不要被所谓的'规则'限制了思维。
examples.pinyin: Búyào bèi suǒwèi de 'guīzé' xiànzhì le sīwéi.
examples.english: Don't let so-called 'rules' limit your thinking.

grammar_points.name: "也就是说" (That Is To Say)
grammar_points.explanation: 连接词，用于解释说明。

examples.chinese: 艺术没有标准答案，也就是说每个人都可以有自己的理解。
examples.pinyin: Yìshù méiyǒu biāozhǔn dá'àn, yě jiùshì shuō měi ge rén dōu kěyǐ yǒu zìjǐ de lǐjiě.
examples.english: Art has no standard answer, that is to say, everyone can have their own understanding.

examples.chinese: 他很忙，也就是说他没时间帮你。
examples.pinyin: Tā hěn máng, yě jiùshì shuō tā méi shíjiān bāng nǐ.
examples.english: He's very busy, that is to say, he doesn't have time to help you.

examples.chinese: 失败了，也就是说这种方法不行。
examples.pinyin: Shībài le, yě jiùshì shuō zhè zhǒng fāngfǎ bùxíng.
examples.english: It failed, that is to say, this method doesn't work.

grammar_points.name: "只有...才..." (Only... Can...)
grammar_points.explanation: 条件复句，表示唯一的条件。

examples.chinese: 只有休息好，才能工作好。
examples.pinyin: Zhǐyǒu xiūxi hǎo, cái néng gōngzuò hǎo.
examples.english: Only when you rest well can you work well.

examples.chinese: 只有努力，才能成功。
examples.pinyin: Zhǐyǒu nǔlì, cái néng chénggōng.
examples.english: Only through hard work can you succeed.

examples.chinese: 只有坚持到底，才能看到结果。
examples.pinyin: Zhǐyǒu jiānchí dàodǐ, cái néng kàn dào jiéguǒ.
examples.english: Only by persisting to the end can you see results.

grammar_points.name: "否则" (Otherwise)
grammar_points.explanation: 连词'否则'表示如果不这样，就会产生某种结果。

examples.chinese: 要平衡工作和生活，否则身体会受不了。
examples.pinyin: Yào pínghéng gōngzuò hé shēnghuó, fǒuzé shēntǐ huì shòu bù liǎo.
examples.english: Balance work and life, otherwise your body won't be able to handle it.

examples.chinese: 要早点完成，否则来不及。
examples.pinyin: Yào zǎodiǎn wánchéng, fǒuzé láibuji.
examples.english: Finish early, otherwise there won't be enough time.

grammar_points.name: "尽量" (As Much As Possible)
grammar_points.explanation: 副词'尽量'表示尽可能做某事。

examples.chinese: 尽量选择公共交通出行。
examples.pinyin: Jǐnliàng xuǎnzé gōnggòng jiāotōng chūxíng.
examples.english: Choose public transport as much as possible.

examples.chinese: 尽量减少一次性物品的使用。
examples.pinyin: Jǐnliàng jiǎnshǎo yícìxìng wùpǐn de shǐyòng.
examples.english: Reduce the use of disposable items as much as possible.

examples.chinese: 尽量早睡早起。
examples.pinyin: Jǐnliàng zǎoshuì zǎoqǐ.
examples.english: Go to bed and get up early as much as possible.

grammar_points.name: "从...做起" (Start From...)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示从某处开始行动。

examples.chinese: 保护环境，从我做起。
examples.pinyin: Bǎohù huánjìng, cóng wǒ zuò qǐ.
examples.english: Protect the environment, start with yourself.

examples.chinese: 从小事做起。
examples.pinyin: Cóng xiǎoshì zuò qǐ.
examples.english: Start from small things.

examples.chinese: 从现在做起。
examples.pinyin: Cóng xiànzài zuò qǐ.
examples.english: Start from now.
